description: This file defines a React functional component for an inspections page in a frontend asset management platform. It handles loading assets, submitting new inspection data (including optional photos), and displaying results of inspections.

methods.name: InspectionsPage
methods.description: React component managing the inspection logging UI, including form handling, asset loading, and result display.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Handles form submission to create a new inspection, including error handling and state updates.
